allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Upgrade chatbot to Gemini 3 Flash and add smart sleep recommendations

Chatbot improvements:
- Update model from gemini-2.0-flash to gemini-3-flash-preview
- Set temperature to 1.0 \(required for Gemini 3\)
- Restructure prompt with XML tags per Google best practices

Sleep recommendation system:
- Add SleepRecommendationService with comprehensive recommendation logic
- Calculate wake times adjusted for late bedtimes
- Dynamic nap recommendations based on previous nap quality
- Bedtime adjustments for skipped/short/long naps
- Historical pattern analysis from last 14 days of sleep data
- Age-appropriate guidelines blended with personalized history
- Add getSleepHistory method to SupabaseService

Key scenarios handled:
- Late sleep -> adjusted wake time to reset schedule
- Skipped nap -> earlier bedtime recommendation
- Short nap -> reduced wake window, earlier bedtime
- Long nap -> extended wake window, later bedtime OK
- Late nap -> ensure minimum wake window before bed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
